'''Interlopers''' were medium-range troop [[Transport/Legends|transports]] used by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] forces fighting for the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] during the final years of the [[New Sith Wars]].

==Characteristics==
Interlopers were small ships, capable of carrying ten people—apparently including the pilot and co-pilot. Their cockpit controls were generally similar to those of [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] ship, and they were considered the direct counterparts of the Republic's [[Transport/Legends|Bivouac transports]], but they were less heavily armored than the Bivouac, trading protection for longer range and greater maneuverability.

They only carried limited weaponry, however, and this made them vulnerable to the fighters used by the Republic and [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]], such as [[Seeker (aircraft)|seekers]]. They thus required a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] escort for safety while operating in combat zones.

It is not clear whether Interlopers had [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], or if they were deployed as sublight dropships from [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]]—or even if they were atmosphere-only flyers. Their use of [[Ion engine/Legends|ion drives]] for sublight propulsion suggests that they may have had at least a limited sub-orbital capability, but no direct evidence is known for sure.

==History==
During the [[Ruusan campaign]], a group of five Interlopers brought reinforcements from the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] to the main camp of [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Skere Kaan|Kaan's]] Sith army on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]]. This does not tell us anything certain about their capabilities, however: they could have come directly from Korriban, deployed from a larger ship in orbit, or simply been operating from a spaceport elsewhere in Sith-controlled territory.

On individual interstellar missions, however, [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] are recorded using other types of ship, such as [[Buzzard (starfighter)|Buzzard]] fighters and [[T-class long-range personal cruiser/Legends|T-class]] space cruisers, rather than Interlopers.

==Behind the scenes==
Interlopers appeared in the novel [[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]], written by [[Drew Karpyshyn]] and released on [[September 26]], [[2006]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}}
